POST restapi/personal/courses/cards/rank/v1

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Models.PersonCourseRankWithKpi
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseRanks

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonCourseRank

None.
kpiOperation

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Models.KpiOperation

None.

Request Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "courseRanks": [
    {
      "CourseId": 1,
      "Rank": 2
    },
    {
      "CourseId": 1,
      "Rank": 2
    }
  ],
  "kpiOperation": 1
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<PersonCourseRankWithKpi xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Models">
  <courseRanks xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities">
    <d2p1:PersonCourseRank>
      <d2p1:CourseId>1</d2p1:CourseId>
      <d2p1:Rank>2</d2p1:Rank>
    </d2p1:PersonCourseRank>
    <d2p1:PersonCourseRank>
      <d2p1:CourseId>1</d2p1:CourseId>
      <d2p1:Rank>2</d2p1:Rank>
    </d2p1:PersonCourseRank>
  </courseRanks>
  <kpiOperation>Begin</kpiOperation>
</PersonCourseRankWithKpi>

application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Sample: 
No sample available

Response Information

Resource Description

None.
